title: pilocarpus alatus
intro: Pilocarpus alatus, also known as the Jaborandi plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the production of pilocarpine, a natural alkaloid with muscarinic agonist effects. Pilocarpine is used to treat various health conditions, including glaucoma, hypertension, and urinary retention, by increasing fluid secretion and relaxing smooth muscle. Pilocarpus alatus is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits in managing respiratory issues and promoting digestive health.
